summary: Tested Ad Submission feature with video/image media support. All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend Wallet page shows Create Ad button and CreateAdModal with media upload section. Admin Console Ads tab displays video/image badges for ads with media.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed ads with image and video media types for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad submission with video/image support fully working. CreateAdModal on Wallet page has 3-step flow: Step 1 (Content + Media Upload), Step 2 (Targeting), Step 3 (Preview & Budget). Admin Console > Ads > Approval Queue shows video badges (red) and image badges (blue) for ads with media.

GET /api/ads/my-submissions.description: Returns user's ads with media fields and counts by status

GET /api/admin/ads/queue.description: Returns pending/approved/rejected ads with media fields

Wallet Page Create Ad Button.description: Button visible with data-testid='create-ad-btn', shows 'Promote Your Business' section with ad status badges

CreateAdModal Media Upload.description: Modal opens with 'Upload Image or Video' section, shows 'Max 10MB image, 50MB video' text

Admin Queue Media Badges.description: Video badge (red) and Image badge (blue) displayed for ads with media in Approval Queue
